description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and light gray stripes running parallel across its length. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, modern appearance. The striped pattern on the top is sharply defined, suggesting a deliberate design, possibly for visual contrast or to serve as a warning or demarcation. The block is thick and robust, with a substantial height relative to its footprint, indicating it is intended as a barrier or obstacle. The surface texture appears slightly rough, typical of stone, but the stripes are clean and regular. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with alternating black and light gray stripes on its top surface and solid black sides. The design is bold and modern, with a slightly rough stone texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped top surface with horizontal stripes and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical orientation of the stripes and the solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with horizontal stripes on top and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing vertical stripes and a solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a visual and physical barrier
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: no visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
